title: Bloome 2pk Round Aroma Mist Diffuser Jasmine 200ml - Decorative Perfect Electric Essential Oil Diffusers for Home, Office & Bathroom, Long Lasting USB Plug In for Pet Odours, Kitchen, & Room Freshness
features: Complete Diffuser Set Included – Each 2-pack contains a USB-powered white round diffuser, a 10ml jasmine fragrance oil in a glass bottle, 1 cotton wick, 1 USB cable, and instructions for quick, simple use.

Clean White Round Design – Sleek and modern, this diffuser blends seamlessly into any décor, from minimal bedroom accessories to chic living room accents. A decorative essential that doubles as a functional room diffuser.
USB-Powered Convenience – Use safely with a wall adapter for consistent performance. A practical addition to your home, offering hassle-free operation without the need for batteries.

Refreshing Jasmine Aroma – The included water-based jasmine oil provides a fresh and uplifting atmosphere. Just add water and a few drops of essential oils for diffuser use, and enjoy an instant burst of fragrance.

Versatile Home Décor Accessory – Works as both a diffuser and decorative piece, making it perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, or offices. Lightweight and compact, ideal for gifting or for daily home fragrance use.

Discover Refills, Diffusers & Gel Fresheners! 2pk Round Diffuser Add To Basket 4pk Plug In + 22 Refills Add To Basket 4pk Plug In + 11 Refills Add To Basket 4pk Wall Plug In Add To Basket Customer Reviews 5.0 out of 5 stars 3 2.5 out of 5 stars 2 3.5 out of 5 stars 14 1.0 out of 5 stars 4 Price £9.49 £ 9 . 49 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 Suitable for Any Space ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Giftable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Compact Design ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Long-Lasting Performance ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What will I receive in the Bloome 2pk Round Aroma Mist Diffuser Jasmine Set? Each 2-pack includes a USB-powered white round diffuser, a 10ml jasmine fragrance oil in a glass bottle, 1 cotton wick, 1 USB cable, and clear instructions for quick and simple use. How do I use this electric essential oil diffuser? Fill the diffuser with water, add a few drops of essential oil, connect via USB, and switch on. The mist diffuser will disperse a fine, fragrant mist, enhancing your room with freshness. Where can I use this aroma diffuser at home? This versatile electric diffuser is ideal for bedrooms, living rooms, kitchens, bathrooms, or workspaces. It blends into modern décor while doubling as both a decorative and functional home fragrance diffuser. How is this diffuser powered? The diffuser is powered via USB and is designed for use with a standard wall adapter. This provides consistent performance and convenient operation without the need for batteries. What scent is included with this electric oil diffuser set? Each pack comes with a 10ml water-based jasmine fragrance oil. It provides a refreshing, uplifting aroma and can be used alongside other essential oils for diffusers if preferred.
